creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Sorry, I can't publish packages built on my personal machine(s). The build artifacts are just a cache from testing multitude of patches (mine and not) at the same time before landing. Often some packages are out of sync with each other as I only build individual ports, not the whole tree. For anything usable or trustworthy ask a different person or set up a FreeBSD box, apply the patches from bug 218788 + bug 222433 and build yourself. ICU itself doesn't have a lot of dependencies.
